title: pelargonium auritum var. carneum
intro: Pelargonium auritum var. carneum, also known as the Candy Rose Geranium or Red Leaf Geranium, is a succulent plant belonging to the Geraniaceae family, characterized by its red-tinged, velvety leaves and clusters of pink or white flowers. Traditionally, the plant has been used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, including antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Pelargonium auritum var. carneum include relief from stress and anxiety, improved digestion, and the treatment of skin conditions such as eczema and acne. Herbal preparations of the plant, typically in the form of teas, tinctures, or essential oils, are used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
